key_points: Democracy improves decision making through debate and discussion
Democratic governments are accountable and responsive
Democracy allows peaceful resolution of social conflicts
Economic development depends on many factors besides democracy
Democracy promotes dignity and freedom of citizens
concepts: Accountable government responds to the needs of people
Legitimate governments are accepted by citizens
Majority rule must respect minority rights
exam_tips: Explain concepts using real-life democratic examples
Mention both advantages and limitations of democracy
Use key terms like accountability, legitimacy and equality
Write brief explanations instead of one-word answers
